title: polystichum falcatum var. macrophyllum
intro: Polystichum falcatum var. macrophyllum, also known as the Japanese holly fern, is a type of evergreen fern native to East Asia. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Polystichum falcatum var. macrophyllum include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and promoting overall well-being. Traditionally, the plant is prepared for medicinal use through infusions, decoctions, or dried powders, which are used to treat various health conditions.
